series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, eligibility queries, eligibility rosters, applications and correspondence from parents, students, high school guidance counselors and financial aid officers related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain correspondence from students, parents and institutions and copies of checks from institutions in office for 5 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain student applications applied through FAFSA and downloaded from Federal processing website and payment information for 5 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
